overall.description: Aerial gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing an eagle flying over ancient Alexandria. The bird soars above Greek-style residential buildings, crosses the harbor, and circles the Lighthouse of Alexandria before ascending to its golden beacon summit.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Greek residential district with courtyard villas

agents.ego_description: eagle soaring over ancient city rooftops and garden courtyards

entered.detail: whitewashed stone structures with red terracotta roofs and columned porticoes
enclosed green spaces with palm trees and cypress trees visible between buildings
classical Greek sculptures standing in courtyard centers
clay roof tiles covering the residential structures in the district

segments.scene_description: The eagle glides over an ancient Greek residential district with whitewashed stone villas and red terracotta roofs. Courtyard gardens with palm trees and classical marble statues are visible below as the bird maintains steady forward flight.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient harbor with sailing vessels and stone docks

events.description: transition from urban buildings to open water as eagle flies over the harbor

agents.ego_description: eagle gliding over harbor waters toward the distant lighthouse

entered.detail: deep blue harbor water with gentle waves reflecting the golden sunlight
wooden sailing vessels with square sails and rows of oars docked in the harbor
ancient stone piers and wharves lining the coastline

segments.scene_description: Leaving the city behind, the eagle crosses over the deep blue harbor waters. Ancient trireme ships with square sails are visible below near stone docks, while the terracotta rooftops fade into the distance on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: lighthouse island with rocky coastline and temple structures

events.description: eagle begins circling the base of the lighthouse structure
eagle banks sharply to align with the lighthouse tower face

agents.ego_description: eagle circling the lighthouse island and examining the tower base

entered.detail: massive white stone lighthouse structure rising from the rocky island
craggy coastline and breakwater surrounding the lighthouse base
minor shrines and auxiliary buildings on the lighthouse island

segments.scene_description: The eagle arrives at the lighthouse island, circling the massive white stone base of the Pharos. Rocky shorelines and small temple structures are visible on the island while the harbor water recedes into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: lighthouse summit with golden beacon dome

events.description: eagle begins ascending the lighthouse tower in a spiral pattern
eagle reaches the summit and circles the golden beacon dome

agents.ego_description: eagle climbing the tower face and circling the golden beacon at the summit

entered.detail: vertical white stone wall with small rectangular windows and red decorative bands
gilded dome structure at the lighthouse summit containing the beacon fire
bronze statue of a deity standing atop the beacon structure
distant view of Alexandria city and surrounding coastline from high altitude

segments.scene_description: Spiraling upward along the tower face, the eagle ascends past rows of small windows. The golden beacon dome grows larger until the bird reaches the summit, circling the bronze statue and gilded beacon chamber with panoramic views of the coastline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial glide that begins over a residential city district and ascends to the summit of a monumental lighthouse. It begins by soaring above whitewashed stone villas and terracotta roofs, passing over courtyard gardens filled with palm trees and marble statues. As the eagle leaves the city behind, the scene shifts to the deep blue waters of the harbor where ancient triremes sail near stone docks. The camera then transitions toward the lighthouse island, circling the massive white stone base of the Pharos and its rocky shoreline before spiraling upward along the tower's face. Finally, the ascent culminates at the golden beacon dome, circling the bronze statue and gilded chamber to reveal a panoramic view of the coastline.
